summary: Comprehensive testing of Quantitative Research Laboratory MVP completed. Backend APIs working excellently (95.5% success rate), frontend UI flows functional with one modal interaction issue.

minor_issues.impact: Order book visualization not working for some assets

ui_bugs.issue: Modal dialog overlay intercepting click events on submit button
ui_bugs.details: Dialog overlay preventing strategy creation form submission

workflow_issues.issue: Cannot complete strategy creation due to modal overlay blocking interaction
workflow_issues.workaround: Force clicks might work but not reliable

passed_tests: User registration flow with email validation
User login flow with JWT token handling
Dashboard page loads with comprehensive stats and charts
Market Data Manager - asset and exchange listing
Market Data Manager - data feed creation and management
Feature Generation Engine - feature toggles and generation
Navigation between all pages via sidebar
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal dialog overlay issue in Strategy Builder component to allow proper form submission. Consider adding z-index management or proper modal close handling.
